none.summary: Python None operator, undefined in GSC.

null.summary: java Null operator, undefined in GSC.

thr.summary: shorter version of thread. i know is not that long but i hate it.

end.summary: shorter version of end. i know is not that long but i hate it.

wait_blackscreen.summary: wait till the black screen is passed.

wait_any.summary: Wait any string and return it.

waitill.mandatory1: <entity> something that is waiting for an event to happen, can be level too.
waitill.mandatory2: <string> string needed to wait a specific string event.

givepoints.summary: Custom command to give a player points.
givepoints.mandatory1: <player> the player to give point to.
givepoints.mandatory2: <points> int of the points to give to a player.

takepoints.summary: Custom command to give a player points.
takepoints.mandatory1: <player> the player to take point to.
takepoints.mandatory2: <points> int of the points to take to a player.

$players.summary: Return the array of the players.

giveweapon.summary: Give the weapon to a player.
giveweapon.optional1: [is_upgrade] default false, give the upgraded weapon of the weapon
giveweapon.optional2: [magic_box] default false, i don't know what that do.
giveweapon.optional3: [nosound] default false, if true the '$$$$ sound' will not play.
giveweapon.optional4: [b_switch_weapon] default true, switch to the given weapon.

jteleporthere.summary: Teleport the player to the given location
jteleporthere.mandatory1: <vec or model or struct> the weapon to give.

burn.summary: Set the player on fire, on its view and on third person.
burn.mandatory2: <interval> Time in seconds on how often you take fire damage.
burn.mandatory3: <damage per interval> Damage inflict every interval.

spawnzombie.summary: Custom commands from j utils to spawn a zombie.
spawnzombie.optional1: <actor> You can set a specific actor to spawn, otherwise stardards zombies.
spawnzombie.mandatory1: <positions> Spawn point or spawn points where you want the zombie to spawn.
spawnzombie.optional2: [model] set a specific model to the spawned zombie.

setzombiespeed.summary: Make the zombie, walk, run, sprint or supersprinter
setzombiespeed.mandatory1: <run state> String for the zombie state, walk, run, sprint or supersprinter

getstruct.summary: Shorter version to get a single struct.

precache.summary: Use to precache xmodel, fx, xanim etc...

maketrigger.summary: Return a created trigger radius use on a given spot.
maketrigger.mandatory1: <origin> The place given as entity or vector

spawnmodel.summary: Return a spawned model on the given spot.
spawnmodel.optional1: [angles] Angles of the model as vector.

jspinme.summary: make something spin on Y axis

jfloatme.summary: make something float on Z axis

print.mandatory1: <text> The text you want to see on the screen.

$use.summary: Convert use with ^3&&1^7 (color yellow of your use button)

jplayfx.summary: Return a spawned invisible model with an fx applied to it, with the given duration. Last forever if no duration is provided, or until the returned model has been deleted.
jplayfx.mandatory1: <model or struct> An existing model, or struct, or a vector.
jplayfx.mandatory2: <fx> string of an FX, must be precached first.
jplayfx.optional1: [duration] duration in seconds, if omitted, will last forever or till deleted.

zombie_death_cb.summary: Call the &function when a zombie die, giving the zombie as self.

actor_damage_cb.summary: Call the &function when an actor take damage, giving the AI as self.

on_spawned_cb.summary: Call the &function when a player spawn from spectator.

player_damage_cb.summary: Call the &function when a player take damage.

on_connect_cb.summary: Call the &function when a player connect into the game.

removepowerups.summary: Remove a powerup from the map, don't remove them all or the map will crash.
removepowerups.mandatory1: <powerup> The string of the powerup name: minigun, nuke, insta_kill, full_ammo

flaginit.summary: Initialize a flag on level. Auto-prepends 'level'.
flaginit.mandatory1: <flag_name> The string name of the flag to initialize.

flagset.summary: Set a flag on level. Auto-prepends 'level'.
flagset.mandatory1: <flag_name> The string name of the flag to set.

flagwait.summary: Wait until a flag is set on level. Auto-prepends 'level'.
flagwait.mandatory1: <flag_name> The string name of the flag to wait for.

flagclear.summary: Wait until a flag is cleared on level. Auto-prepends 'level'.
flagclear.mandatory1: <flag_name> The string name of the flag to wait for clear.

getent.summary: Get a single entity by key/value pair.

getents.summary: Get an array of entities by key/value pair.

playsound.summary: Play a sound at a position.
playsound.mandatory2: <position> The position (vector) to play the sound at.

loopsound.summary: Play a looping sound on an entity.

stopsound.summary: Stop a looping sound on an entity.

randint.summary: Returns a random integer from 0 to max-1.

randfloat.summary: Returns a random float between min and max.
